title: calibration.match.suggest.batch
description: Request ranked calibration master suggestions for multiple light sessions in a single call. Read-only; never persists state. Supports partial success: some sessions may return matches while others return observer_location_missing or session.mixed_state. Used by spec 008 project-level calibration preparation.

CalibrationType.description: Calibration type. dark_flat is reserved and not valid in v1 (R-DarkFlat-Reserved).

confidence.description: Scalar 0.0–1.0. Clamped to prevent negative values from summed soft penalties (R-OverridePenalty).

sessionId.description: The light session this result corresponds to.

status.description: Result kind for this (session, calibrationType) pair. 'observer_location_missing': session lacks observer_location or exposure_start_utc; must be reviewed before matching (A6). 'session.mixed_state': session type is mixed; must be split first (E5). 'match': at least one candidate returned. 'ambiguous': multiple candidates at similar confidence. 'no_match': no compatible masters found.

candidates.description: Ranked candidate list when status is 'match' or 'ambiguous'. Empty or absent for other statuses.

sessionId.description: Session that caused the error, when applicable.

sessionIds.description: Light session IDs to suggest calibration for. Must be non-empty.

calibrationTypes.description: Subset of calibration types to evaluate per session. When omitted, all three types (dark, flat, bias) are evaluated for each session.

Response.description: Response envelope for calibration.match.suggest.batch. Partial success is supported: results and errors may both be present in the same response when some sessions produce matches and others encounter errors.

status.description: 'success': all sessions processed (some may have observer_location_missing or session.mixed_state result status — these are per-item statuses, not top-level errors). 'partial': at least one session returned results and at least one returned a hard error. 'error': all sessions failed with hard errors.

results.description: Per-(session, calibrationType) results. Present for all successfully evaluated pairs. observer_location_missing and session.mixed_state are per-item statuses within results, not errors.

errors.description: Hard errors for sessions that could not be evaluated at all (e.g. session.not_found). Present when status is 'partial' or 'error'.
